events.name: UNIT_CLICK
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } when a gem is clicked

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Resets gems, score, moves, and combo to the authored layout

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Emitted when moves reach zero (result over)
